tasks.subject: Task 1: Add EventUpdated model constant and fix build_success rollup state
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `EventUpdated` to the event type enum and correct `mqStateToRollup` so `build_success` produces `RollupFinished` instead of `RollupSucceeded`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/model/types.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/mq/consumer.go` (`mqStateToRollup` function)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `model.EventUpdated` constant exists with value `"updated"`
- [ ] `mqStateToRollup("opensuse.obs.package.build_success")` returns `model.RollupFinished`
- [ ] `mqStateToRollup("opensuse.obs.package.build_fail")` still returns `model.RollupFailed`
- [ ] `mqStateToRollup("opensuse.obs.package.build_unchanged")` still returns `model.RollupSucceeded`
- [ ] `go build ./...` passes with no errors

**Verify:** `cd backend && go build ./...` → exits 0 with no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/model/types.go", "backend/internal/mq/consumer.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["model.EventUpdated constant exists with value updated", "mqStateToRollup build_success returns RollupFinished", "go build passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add GetFinishedPackagesByProject to store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a store function that returns all packages for a given project with `rollup_state = 'finished'`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/store/packages.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/store/packages_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Returns only packages with `rollup_state = 'finished'` for the exact project
- [ ] Returns empty slice (not error) when no packages match
- [ ] Does not return packages from other projects
- [ ] `go test ./internal/store/... -run TestGetFinishedPackagesByProject -v` passes

**Verify:** `cd backend && go test ./internal/store/... -run TestGetFinishedPackagesByProject -v` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/store/packages.go", "backend/internal/store/packages_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./internal/store/... -run TestGetFinishedPackagesByProject -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GetFinishedPackagesByProject returns only finished packages for exact project", "empty slice not error for unknown project", "TestGetFinishedPackagesByProject passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire new MQ event cases and extend repo.published
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add four new event cases to the MQ consumer and extend `repo.published` to signal `finished` packages.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/mq/consumer.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `package.create` appends EventCreated and signals stub
- [ ] `project.update` appends EventUpdated
- [ ] `project.update_project_conf` appends EventUpdated
- [ ] `package.commit` appends EventUpdated
- [ ] `repo.published` signals finished packages via ws.Signal
- [ ] `go test ./... -race` passes

**Verify:** `cd backend && go test ./... -race` → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/mq/consumer.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./... -race", "acceptanceCriteria": ["package.create appends EventCreated and signals stub", "project.update appends EventUpdated", "repo.published signals finished packages", "all tests pass with -race"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Frontend real-time updates for PR dropdown and version tabs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `useRealtimeStream` to update `prGroups` in real-time and add `'updated'` to the `EventType` union.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/types/api.ts`
- Modify: `frontend/src/composables/useRealtimeStream.ts`
- Modify: `frontend/src/App.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `EventType` includes `'updated'`
- [ ] `useRealtimeStream` signature: `(packages, events, prGroups, refresh, refreshPR)`
- [ ] Unknown PR triggers `refreshPR()`
- [ ] Known PR updated in-place with rollup recomputed
- [ ] Non-PR packages update as before
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/types/api.ts", "frontend/src/composables/useRealtimeStream.ts", "frontend/src/App.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EventType includes updated", "useRealtimeStream accepts prGroups and refreshPR", "new PR triggers refreshPR", "known PR updated in-place", "tsc passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
